source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Thirteen large animals were measured to help determine the relationship between their length and their weight. The natural logarithm of the weight of each animal was taken and a least-squares regression equation for predicting weight from length was determined. The computer output from the analysis is given below. Give a 99% confidence interval for the slope of the regression line. Interpret this interval.
